message:
audit: sharded_state + resource_accounting + time/driver + symbolic_obligation + tcp/split + kafka — all SOUND

Six concurrency correctness audits under bd-2wds9:
- runtime/sharded_state.rs (1,331 LOC): ShardGuard lock ordering, AtomicU64 CAS
- observability/resource_accounting.rs (920 LOC): 34 lock-free atomics, CAS peak
- time/driver.rs (1,140 LOC): VirtualClock atomics, Mutex<TimerWheel>
- record/symbolic_obligation.rs (1,046 LOC): RwLock state, linear type enforcement
- net/tcp/split.rs (910 LOC): Mutex<SplitIoState>, combined waker
- messaging/kafka.rs (896 LOC): oneshot delivery channel

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
